concerns.text: FR-008 text is corrupted with duplicated phrases: 'System MUST verify dataset-variable fit and record System MUST verify that EMP dataset contains required variables...' - appears to be a copy-paste error requiring cleanup.

FR-011 references 'decision thresholds' and 'inconsistency rates' (absolute diff ∈ {0.01, 0.05, 0.1}) that don't align with the research scope. No such thresholds or rates are defined in User Story 2 or the methodology sketch.
FR-013 requires 'validated instruments for questionnaires' but this microbiome research project has no questionnaires or measurement scales. This appears to be template text that wasn't removed.
Empirical values (≥100 samples, ≥50 records, 10k reads) are specified in the spec when template guidance recommends deferring specific empirical values to the implementation/research phase.
